features.General Features: Anti-Skid Traction Control System (TCS): Enhances stability across various road conditions, ensuring a safer ride. | Puncture-Proof Tubeless Tires: The 10-inch tires are designed with an air-tight material layer, reducing maintenance and the risk of punctures. | Efficient Dual Braking System: Combines a front drum brake with a rear electronic brake to provide reliable stopping power. | Large 2.8-Inch Dashboard: The handlebar features a spacious dashboard displaying speed, battery level, and riding mode, along with easy access to power and mode switches, and direction indicator buttons. | Built-In Front and Rear Indicators: Enhance visibility and safety during commutes. | Apple Find My Compatibility: Allows users to locate their scooter easily using the Apple Find My network.
features.What's in the box?: 1x Ninebot E2 PRO Electric Scooter | 1x Charger | 1x User Manual | 1x Tools for assembly
